case_title: LINH PHUNG DAO VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-29-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DAO, LINH PHUNG AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAO, LINH PHUNG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
